misconfig_patterns: AllowAllAuthenticator default — CQL and REST both open
REST API at :10000 exposes full schema without auth
SCYLLA_SHARD_AWARE in banner distinguishes from Cassandra

active_probe.false_positive_check: REST :10000 /v2/cluster_name must return cluster_name field — unique ScyllaDB REST API

deployment_tells: CQL banner includes SCYLLA_SHARD_AWARE — distinguishes ScyllaDB from Cassandra
REST API at :10000 — GET /v2/cluster_name returns cluster name without auth
pivot_paths: CQL DESCRIBE TABLE {t} → detect vector<float,N> columns (ScyllaDB 6.x+)
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
